description_long: This is a modern sport motorcycle with an aggressive, angular design and a streamlined body. The bike features a sharply contoured fuel tank, a stepped seat for rider and passenger, and exposed mechanical components such as the engine and exhaust system. The front end is equipped with a pair of handlebars, mirrors, and a compact headlight assembly, while the rear showcases a single-sided swingarm and a prominent rear tire. The wheels are large and fitted with low-profile tires, and the overall build suggests a focus on performance and agility. The surface finish appears matte or satin, with a predominantly dark color scheme and minimal visible branding or decals.
description: A modern, angular sport motorcycle with a matte dark finish, exposed engine, and aggressive styling. Features include a stepped seat, large wheels, and compact handlebars.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the stepped seat, rear tire, license plate, and left-side exhaust system.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wide rear tire, license plate, and the symmetry of the tail section.
description_view_2: Front three-quarter view displaying the angular front fairing, handlebars, and the detailed engine area.
description_view_3: Frontal view emphasizing the headlight assembly, handlebars, and the aggressive stance of the motorcycle.
